zh: 孩童的發展階段大致可分為三期、
en: Children's developmental stages can broadly be divided into three phases.

zh: 第一期是如有似無目的的錯晝期、
en: The first is the purposeless, seemingly random scribbling phase,
occurring from zero to three years old, known as the scribbling stage,
and some children extend it up to age five.
The second phase is the line-drawing stage,

zh: 在4歲左右的孩童最喜歡晝人、
en: around age four, when children most love to draw people,

zh: 但是人的身體四肢很少被完整畫出來。
en: but the body's limbs are rarely drawn completely.
The third phase is the schematic stage,

zh: 在6歲左右的孩童依然興趣畫人物、
en: around age six, when children still love to draw figures,

zh: 但這個時候已經是經過思考後比較複雜的人像、
en: but their figures are now more thoughtful and complex.

zh: 每個孩童在每一階段停留的時間不一樣、
en: Every child spends a different amount of time in each stage,

zh: 這與其身心發展有相關性。
en: which correlates with their physical and mental development.
